pi_items.source: O*NET Online standard occupation title for 19-1029.01
Standard industry categorization for bioinformatics tasks.
BLS Standard Occupational Classification (SOC) system for major group 19-0000.
Analysis of setup_task.sh and verifier.py confirming the use of Python, pytest, algorithmic logic, and string manipulation.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated FASTQ NGS data. It requires fixing 5 algorithmic bugs in Python genomic sequence processing scripts (Phred offset, reverse complementation, GC content calculation, 'N' codon handling, and 3' quality trimming) injected dynamically by setup_task.sh. All occupation, industry, SOC major group, feature tags, and pass threshold metadata align accurately with the task implementation and verifier logic.
